name: Red Line
uniques: Units ending their turn on this terrain take [50] damage
Must be adjacent to [0] to [1] [Red Line] tiles
Occurs on latitudes from [1] to [99] percent of distance equator to pole
Occurs in groups of [50] to [150] tiles

name: Sky
uniques: Occurs at temperature between [-0.1] and [0.9] and humidity between [0] and [0.2]
Occurs at temperature between [0.1] and [0.5] and humidity between [1] and [1.3]
A Region is formed with at least [25]% [Sky] tiles, with priority [4]
Considered [Undesirable] when determining start locations <in all except [Sky] Regions>
Every [13] tiles with this terrain will receive a major deposit of a strategic resource.
